From the Peter Jones M.D. Collection.

sales.title: Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 430 — Italy. Campana, Neapolis. 4th-3rd Centuries BC. Silver Didrachm (7.68g) 20mm. Head of Nymph r. wearing broad diadem, earring and necklace, dolphins around wavy hair. Reverse: Man-headed bull (off flan
sales.description:
Italy. Campana, Neapolis. 4th-3rd Centuries BC. Silver Didrachm (7.68g) 20mm. Head of Nymph r. wearing broad diadem, earring and necklace, dolphins around wavy hair. Reverse: Man-headed bull (off flan) stg. r. hd. facing, crowned by Nike flying r. S-299; BMC 1, 27. NGC graded Choice Very Fine; Strike: 3/5, Surface: 4/5 Fine Style Lightly toned.  Estimated Value $400 - UP
Ex Peter Preovolos Collection....

sales.description:
Satraps of Caria. Pixodarus, ca. 341-336/5 BC. Silver Didrachm (6.93g), 18 mm. Flowing hair of Apollo 3/4 facing r. with floral border. Reverse:  Zeus Labraundos st. r. lwith axe and sceptre. Lightly toned. NGC Choice VF; Strike: 5/5; Surface: 4/5.   Estimated Value $400 - UP
